zh.name: 会议
zh.description: 多人讨论、决策导向的会议
zh.focus: 结论、关键决策、未决分歧、行动项（事/人/期限）

en.name: Meeting
en.focus: Conclusions, key decisions, open disagreements, action items (what/who/when)

zh.name: 对话/访谈
zh.description: 对话、播客、访谈等观点导向内容
zh.focus: 争论焦点、各方观点与分歧、最有价值的洞见、可带走的启示

en.name: Conversation/Interview
en.focus: What's debated, viewpoints and disagreements, key insights, takeaways

zh.name: 讲解/课程
zh.description: 知识传递、概念讲解、科普
zh.focus: 核心概念及关系、关键原理、实例应用、易混点

en.name: Lecture/Course
en.focus: Core concepts and relations, key principles, examples, common pitfalls

zh.name: 教程
zh.focus: 目标与前置、有序步骤、关键技巧、常见坑

en.name: Tutorial
en.focus: Goal and prerequisites, ordered steps, key tips, common pitfalls

zh.name: 评测
zh.focus: 各维度表现（含数据）、优点、短板、适合谁与结论

en.name: Review
en.focus: Dimension-by-dimension performance with data, pros, cons, who it's for

zh.name: 资讯/纪实
zh.focus: 事件全貌、时间线、关键事实与数据、各方立场、影响与走向

en.name: News/Documentary
en.description: News, current affairs, and documentary reporting
en.focus: What happened, timeline, key facts and data, perspectives, impact

zh.name: 通用
zh.description: 自动识别为以上都不是时的兜底
zh.focus: 主题、核心要点、重要信息与数据、结论与启示

en.name: General
en.description: Fallback when content matches none of the above
en.focus: Topic, core points, key information and data, conclusions
